controls.verifier_policy: explicit two-stage confirm/repair/abstain with evidence-aware semantic checks for cluster completeness, temporal-window correctness, seizure-free threshold, unknown vs no-reference, and evidence quote support

hypothesis: Clean GPT factor-isolation treatment: verify-repair improves monthly-frequency accuracy versus direct single-pass on cap-25 for gan_s0_verification_gpt_validation_v1.
metric_caveats: Clean comparison group gan_s0_verification_gpt_validation_v1; varied_factor verification_strategy.
Verify-repair doubles model calls; latency not comparable to direct-only.
